Package gov.cdc.izgateway.ads

Class MetadataImpl

java.lang.Object
gov.cdc.izgateway.ads.MetadataImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
Metadata, Serializable
public class MetadataImpl extends Object implements Metadata
Primary implementation for the Metadata interface used by the ADS Service
Author:
Audacious Inquiry

      public String getDataStreamId()
      Returns the stored data stream ID if one has been computed and stored, otherwise falls back to the default computation in the Metadata interface.

      Returns:
      the data stream ID for this submission
